name: Masked HERO Dian
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｍ・ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マスクドヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ダイアン
desc: Must be Special Summoned with "Mask Change". When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "HERO" monster from your Deck.
mnst_eff: Must be Special Summoned with "Mask Change". When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "HERO" monster from your Deck.
eff: Must be Special Summoned with "Mask Change". When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle and sends it to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 or lower "HERO" monster from your Deck.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Must be Special Summoned by a specific card effect
